calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kerry Riordan Sykes, via Zoom, for Timothy Burns, Petitioner.

Counsel points to Attachment 3(f)3 of the petition in support of presumption of revocation and that the original will had been inadvertently thrown away. Counsel confirms that Kathleen Sleboda was the decedent's daughter. The court asks if there is anyone appearing to object to the petition. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-07-2014 is admitted to probate. Timothy Burns and Patrick Burns are appointed Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-08-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-16-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
